purposeStatement: Persuade executive leadership to approve H2 resource allocation based on Q2 results

audience.priorKnowledge: Familiar with company strategy, have seen Q1 results
audience.concerns: ROI on strategic pillars, competitive positioning, budget implications

communicationObjectives.think: Q2 execution was strong; the three pillars strategy is working
communicationObjectives.feel: Confident in leadership's execution capability; urgency about H2 window
communicationObjectives.do: Approve $X resource package for H2; prioritize Pillar 2 acceleration

keyMessages.message: Q2 revenue exceeded targets by 3%, validating the strategy
Pillar 2 (Market Expansion) has the highest ROI potential but needs acceleration
H2 window is time-sensitive — competitor moves in Q3 require pre-emptive action
